title: Entity Place Block Behavior
description: AI goal that makes entities place blocks into the world, like Endermen placing their carried block or snow golems leaving snow trails. Configure which blocks can be placed, where they can be placed, and how often the entity attempts placement. Creates mobs that modify the environment.

affected_by_griefing_rule.title: Affected By Griefing Rule
affected_by_griefing_rule.description: If true, whether the goal is affected by the mob griefing game rule.

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.title: Test
test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value being compared with the test.

can_place.title: Can Place
can_place.description: Filters for if the entity should try to place its block. Self and Target are set.

chance.title: Chance
chance.description: Chance each tick for the entity to try and place a block.

on_place.title: Place
on_place.description: Trigger ran if the entity does place its block. Self, Target, and Block are set.

defaultSnippets.label: Entity ActorDefinitionTrigger
defaultSnippets.description: Triggers an entity event when specified conditions are met. Events activate component groups that change entity behavior—transforming villagers into zombie villagers, switching mobs to aggressive mode, or triggering growth stages. Combine with filters to create conditional state machines that respond to gameplay.

placeable_carried_blocks.title: Placeable Carried Blocks
placeable_carried_blocks.description: Block descriptors for which blocks are valid to be placed from the entity's carried item, if empty all blocks are valid.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

randomly_placeable_blocks.title: Randomly Placeable Blocks
randomly_placeable_blocks.description: Weighted block descriptors for which blocks should be randomly placed, if empty the entity will try to place its carried block from placeable_carried_blocks.

xz_range.title: Xz Range
xz_range.description: XZ range from which the entity will try and place blocks in.

y_range.title: y Range
y_range.description: Y range from which the entity will try and place blocks in.
